confidence_rationale: Camera angle and video quality make precise measurement of cutting line deviation difficult. Task completion and timing are clearly visible, but exact penalty assessment is limited by viewing angle.

strengths: Excellent completion time indicating high proficiency
Steady instrument control throughout cutting sequence
improvement_suggestions: Camera angle optimization would allow better assessment of cutting precision
